tasks.description: Create exchange/websocket.py with KrakenWebSocketV2 connection manager: async connect, disconnect, auto-reconnect with exponential backoff (2s-30s), and ping/pong keepalive.
acceptance_criteria: KrakenWebSocketV2 class exists in exchange/websocket.py.
connect() establishes an async WebSocket connection to wss://ws.kraken.com/v2.
disconnect() cleanly closes the connection.
Auto-reconnect on disconnect with exponential backoff: 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, 30s max.
Ping/pong keepalive responds to Kraken server pings.
Connection state is tracked (DISCONNECTED, CONNECTING, CONNECTED, RECONNECTING).
Tests mock the WebSocket and verify connect, disconnect, reconnect backoff timing, and state transitions.

tasks.description: Add public ticker subscription to KrakenWebSocketV2 that emits PriceTick events, with symbol normalization via exchange/symbols.py.
acceptance_criteria: subscribe_ticker(pairs) sends a Kraken WS v2 subscribe message for the ticker channel.
Incoming ticker updates are parsed into PriceTick(pair, bid, ask, last, timestamp) frozen dataclasses.
Symbol normalization converts Kraken WS format (e.g. BTC/USD) to internal pair format via symbols module.
A callback or async queue mechanism delivers PriceTick events to consumers.
Tests mock WS messages and verify correct PriceTick emission with normalized symbols.

tasks.description: Add private execution feed subscription to KrakenWebSocketV2 with WebSocket token authentication and FillConfirmed event emission.
acceptance_criteria: get_ws_token() calls Kraken REST /0/private/GetWebSocketsToken via transport to obtain a WS auth token.
subscribe_executions(token) sends a Kraken WS v2 subscribe message for the executions channel with auth.
Incoming execution updates are parsed into FillConfirmed(order_id, client_order_id, pair, side, quantity, price, fee, timestamp) frozen dataclasses.
A callback or async queue mechanism delivers FillConfirmed events to consumers.
Tests mock the token fetch and WS execution messages, verifying correct FillConfirmed emission.

tasks.description: Add REST polling fallback manager that activates when WebSocket is disconnected, polling GetOpenOrders and ticker at configurable intervals.
acceptance_criteria: A FallbackPoller class or method exists that polls Kraken REST for prices and order status when WebSocket is down.
FallbackPoller activates automatically when KrakenWebSocketV2 enters DISCONNECTED or RECONNECTING state.
FallbackPoller deactivates when WebSocket reconnects and resumes feeds.
Polling interval is configurable (default 15 seconds for prices, 30 seconds for orders).
FallbackPoller emits the same PriceTick and FillConfirmed events as the WebSocket feed for consumer transparency.
Tests verify activation on disconnect, deactivation on reconnect, and correct event emission from polled data.
